text.message: Where abouts in NZ are you from blue
Sweet I'm from the Far North
Living like a jaffa in Auckland though 😆
Are you kiwis gonna collude to win and dance your rugby dance to cerebrate?
Whoa. Glad you know the haka
The haka is very famous here
It's in our books in college
That's awesome. I'm glad they teach it
They should teach it more here lol
Pretty sure the rob is green no?
Oh woops forgot to use one of my knights lol
Yeah but I was getting all the Robs there for some tine
Yup. I must be seen as a threat as well
If you want me to fight army
Not letting you pull for win
Where did that trade come from
I dont have any usefull stuff
The other cards are the ones to worry about lol
